title: dichapetalum sumatranum
intro: Dichapetalum sumatranum, also known as the 'Soap Tree', is a plant species that belongs to the Dichapetalaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dichapetalum sumatranum include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating rheumatic pain. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
